args.subject: Your pro-rata Halcyon refund
args.body: We have processed a pro-rata refund of 240.00 against order ORD-3320 for your ended Halcyon contract. The refund will be processed to your account within 5-7 business days.

args.text: Refund of 240.00 issued to order ORD-3320 and customer notified at accounts@fernwood.example.

args.subject: Fernwood Ltd: deletion schedule confirmed
args.body: The deletion schedule for Fernwood Ltd's exported data has been prepared. All data will be permanently deleted on 2026-08-16, following the 30-day retention hold after export preparation.

args.comment: Access revocation complete; refund processed; deletion schedule confirmed.
